description: Prove that k = Nat.plusR 0 k, where plusR is right-recursive addition on natural numbers.
preamble:
def Nat.plusR : Nat → Nat → Nat
  | n, 0 => n
  | n, k + 1 => plusR n k + 1
statement: theorem plusR_zero_left (k : Nat) : k = Nat.plusR 0 k
notes: From fp-lean/examples/Examples/Induction.lean line 246 (golf version). Original from fp-lean/examples/Examples/DependentTypes/Pitfalls.lean.
